channel.title: GitHub Vue Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Vue in GitHub

item.title: vbenjs/vue-vben-admin
item.description: A modern vue admin panel built with Vue3, Shadcn UI, Vite, TypeScript, and Monorepo. It's fast!

item.title: Miazzy/oa-front-service
item.description: oa-front-service, 基于Vue的OA系统，功能丰富，界面美观，演示地址：https://www.shengtai.club 账户zhaoziyun/Miazzy@163.com

item.title: ElemeFE/element
item.description: A Vue.js 2.0 UI Toolkit for Web

item.title: un-pany/v3-admin-vite
item.description: ☀️ A crafted admin template「vue admin / vue template / vue3 admin / vue3 template / vue3 后台 / vue3 模板」

item.title: nuxt/ui
item.description: A UI Library for Modern Web Apps, powered by Vue & Tailwind CSS.

item.title: CorentinTh/it-tools
item.description: Collection of handy online tools for developers, with great UX.

item.title: imsyy/SPlayer
item.description: 🎉 一个简约的音乐播放器，支持逐字歌词，下载歌曲，展示评论区，音乐云盘及歌单管理，音乐频谱，移动端基础适配 | 网易云音乐 | A minimalist music player

item.title: requarks/wiki
item.description: Wiki.js | A modern and powerful wiki app built on Node.js

item.title: crmeb/CRMEB
item.description: 🔥CRMEB开源商城免费开源多语言商城系统，Tp6框架商城，系统可商用；包含小程序商城、H5商城、公众号商城、PC商城、App，支持分销、拼团、砍价、秒杀、优惠券、积分、会员等级、小程序直播、页面DIY，前后端分离，方便二开，更有详细使用文档、接口文档、数据字典、二开文档/视频教程，欢迎大家提出宝贵意见和建议

item.title: hslr-s/sun-panel
item.description: A server, NAS navigation panel, Homepage, browser homepage. | 一个服务器、NAS导航面板、Homepage、浏览器首页。

item.title: LOG1997/log-lottery
item.description: 🎈🎈🎈🎈年会抽奖程序，threejs+vue3 3D球体动态抽奖应用。

item.title: primefaces/primevue
item.description: Next Generation Vue UI Component Library

item.title: intel/AI-Playground
item.description: AI PC starter app for doing AI image creation, image stylizing, and chatbot on a PC powered by an Intel® Arc™ GPU.

item.title: unovue/radix-vue
item.description: Vue port of Radix UI Primitives. An open-source UI component library for building high-quality, accessible design systems and web apps.

item.title: bastienwirtz/homer
item.description: A very simple static homepage for your server.

item.title: kailong321200875/vue-element-plus-admin
item.description: A backend management system based on vue3, typescript, element-plus, and vite

item.title: vueComponent/ant-design-vue
item.description: 🌈 An enterprise-class UI components based on Ant Design and Vue. 🐜

item.title: AutomaApp/automa
item.description: A browser extension for automating your browser by connecting blocks

item.title: yangjian102621/geekai
item.description: AI 助手全套开源解决方案，自带运营管理后台，开箱即用。集成了 ChatGPT, Azure, ChatGLM,讯飞星火，文心一言等多个平台的大语言模型。支持 MJ AI 绘画，Stable Diffusion AI 绘画，微博热搜等插件工具。采用 Go + Vue3 + element-plus 实现。

item.title: dullage/flatnotes
item.description: A self-hosted, database-less note taking web app that utilises a flat folder of markdown files for storage.
